## Script #10 — The "Exhausted but Wired" Monologue

**Persona:** The Chronic Everything-Failer (CEF)
**Structure:** Narrative Monologue
**Duration:** ~54 seconds
**Caption style:** Subtitle-only style (auto-generated feel) for monologue; bold cards for proof
**Close Type:** Outcome-Anchored
VO voice: Female, 35-45, raw and intimate (bedroom-sharing-a-secret tone).

---

Reach Digital_Stellar Sleep_CEF_Monologue_10_T002

### Concept
This script uses the **"Narrative Monologue"** structure to target the ultra-relatable "wired but tired" state. It relies on high emotional fidelity and a confessional tone to build a bridge from shared misery to a scientific discovery (CBT-I), avoiding a "salesy" pitch by framing the solution as a personal breakthrough.

### Visual Direction
- **B-roll:** AI character (Female, 35-45) sitting on the edge of a bed in a dimly lit bedroom. Medium close-up. Soft, realistic lighting. 
- **Edit pace:** Slow and intimate. Long holds on the character's facial expressions during the pain beats.
- **Color:** Moody night-time palette shifting to warm morning sunlight at the close.

### References
- **Format**
  - **Narrative Monologue Template** , AI character direct-to-camera, high emotional fidelity.
- **Top Spender**
  - `vid_pain stack text wall_10_T001_v3` (Tone and atmospheric pain anchor)

### Footage
- [Stellar Sleep Science Page](https://stellarsleep.com/learn/why-stellar-sleep) (Harvard claim and clinical outcome stats)

---

### Hook Variation A — Question

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:00-0:03 | AI character sitting on bed, looking exhausted, resting head in hands. Medium close-up. | Have you ever been so tired you can’t actually fall asleep? | INSOMNIA:<br>EXHAUSTED BUT WIRED. |

### Hook Variation B — Reframe

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:00-0:03 | AI character looks up at camera, slight head tilt. Intimate framing. | It's not stress keeping you up. It's conditioning. | STOP CHASING STRESS.<br><br>FIX THE CONDITIONING. |

### Hook Variation C — VoC Hook

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:00-0:04 | AI character looking out a window into the dark. Moody lighting. | I accepted I was going to be a poor sleeper my whole life. | I ACCEPTED I'D BE A POOR SLEEPER FOREVER. |

---

### Body (same for all hooks)

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:10-0:18 | AI character lying back on the pillow, eyes wide open, blue light reflecting on face. | It’s a specific kind of misery. You’re bone-tired all day, but as soon as your head hits the pillow, your brain turns on like a neon sign. | BONE-TIRED ALL DAY.<br><br>WIRED AT NIGHT. |
| 0:18-0:26 | Cut to a "failed shelf" visual: 3D render of various sleep aids (tea, pills) being pushed aside. | You’ve tried the teas, the pills, the weighted blankets. They fail because they treat the symptoms, not the root cause. | ❌ PILLS & TEAS.<br><br>THEY TREAT SYMPTOMS. |
| 0:26-0:34 | 3D animation: Brain map overlay on the character, shifting from red to glowing pulses. | Your brain has spent so many nights awake that it’s learned to treat the bed as a place to be alert. It's literally conditioned to stay awake. | YOUR BRAIN LEARNED<br>TO STAY AWAKE. |
| 0:34-0:42 | Transition to 3D character in a clean room, holding a phone with the Stellar Sleep app. | That’s why you need CBT-I. It's the clinical protocol Founded and developed at Harvard to retrain your brain to sleep naturally again. | FOUNDED AND DEVELOPED AT HARVARD.<br><br>CBT-I PROTOCOL. |
| 0:42-0:50 | Screen record of the app interface. 80% stat card pops up with App Store badges. | Stellar Sleep retrains your brain in 10 minutes a day. And Over 80% improve sleep. | OVER 80% IMPROVE SLEEP.<br><br>JUST 10 MIN A DAY. |

### Close — Outcome-Anchored

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:50-0:54 | AI character waking up in the morning, sunlight filling the room. Logo fade in. | Wake up rested. Stellar Sleep. | WAKE UP RESTED.<br>🌙 Stellar Sleep |
